recommendations.title: Tad and The Emerald Tablet
recommendations.overview: Tad accidentally unleashes an ancient spell, endangering the lives of his friends Mummy, Jeff, and Belzoni. With everyone against him and only helped by Sara, he sets off on an adventure to end the Curse of the Mummy.

recommendations.title: Tad, the Lost Explorer

recommendations.title: Tad, the Lost Explorer, and the Secret of King Midas

recommendations.title: Fly Me to the Moon
recommendations.overview: Sparks fly in all directions as marketing maven Kelly Jones, brought in to fix NASA's public image, wreaks havoc on Apollo 11 launch director Cole Davis' already difficult task of putting a man on the moon. When the White House deems the mission too

recommendations.title: Over the Moon
recommendations.overview: Fueled by memories of her mother, resourceful Fei Fei builds a rocket to the moon on a mission to prove the existence of a legendary moon goddess.

recommendations.title: Monsters University
recommendations.overview: A look at the relationship between Mike and Sulley during their days at Monsters University — when they weren't necessarily the best of friends.

recommendations.title: Wonderful Days

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Apollo 11
recommendations.overview: A look at the Apollo 11 mission to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.
